chain.thought: Explanation: Dmitry Mikhailovich Golitsyn served from October 1761 to April 1792 (about 30 years and 6 months), while Andrey Kirillovich Razumovsky served from 5 October 1801 to 7 September 1806 (about 4 years and 11 months). Therefore, Golitsyn served longer.

judge_thought: Explanation: Dmitry Mikhailovich Golitsyn served as ambassador from October 1761 to April 1792 (about 30 years and 6 months), while Andrey Kirillovich Razumovsky served from 5 October 1801 to 7 September 1806 (just under 5 years). Therefore, Golitsyn served longer.
